WIC Orientation: Welcome to WIC!
WIC Orientation: Welcome to WIC!
Translate this page
Welcome to WIC!
English
I
Spanish
We're so glad you're here! In this short introduction, you will get a quick overview of everything you need to make the most of your WIC benefits.
Here's what you will learn:
The many services and benefits WIC offers you and your family
How to confidently shop with your California WIC Card
Your
Rights and Responsibilities
as a WIC participant
All of this is covered in seven short videos that take just 20-25 minutes to complete
